description_long: This lounge set consists of two plush, barrel-shaped armchairs upholstered in a soft, muted pink fabric, paired with a low, round coffee table featuring a dark, metallic finish. The armchairs have a continuous, curved backrest and armrest design, creating a cozy, enveloping seating area. Each chair sits on slender, angled metal legs with a subtle metallic sheen, providing a modern and airy appearance. The coffee table is cylindrical, with a smooth, reflective surface and a solid, sturdy build, contrasting elegantly with the softness of the chairs. The overall arrangement suggests a comfortable and inviting spot for conversation or relaxation, suitable for urban parks, plazas, or upscale outdoor lounges. The materials and design evoke a sense of contemporary style and comfort, blending soft textiles with sleek metal accents.
description: A pair of curved, pink upholstered armchairs with metal legs, arranged around a dark, round metallic coffee table. The set exudes modern comfort and style, ideal for urban relaxation spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing both armchairs facing each other with the coffee table centered between them.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curved backs and metal legs of the armchairs, with the coffee table partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded backs of both armchairs and the full circular top of the coffee table.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the armchairs' enveloping shape and the table's metallic finish.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each chair has a single, thick seat cushion and a continuous, padded backrest with integrated side cushioning; all cushions appear attached and uniformly sized.
attribute_backrest_design: Curved, mid-height backrest forming a smooth, enveloping arc with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present, integrated into the continuous curve of the backrest, padded and at medium height.
attribute_leg_style: Slender, angled metal legs with a slight outward splay, medium height, and a minimalist, modern appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid pink fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
